block_04: Why is Trading Volume so Important?
block_05: Trading volume is a critical value that shows you how much an asset is being traded at any particular time but it is often overlooked by traders. To help you learn more, we’ve written this article describing trading volume and how it can be used.
block_07: Candlestick Patterns: 4 Tips for Better Results
